note: Informational pre-check for Repository Transaction Framework Stage 4 (Validation) / Stage 5 (Publication). Does not block either stage.

files.note: DB process doc (DATABASE_TRUTH.md "Related Process Docs" — operational detail, not the authority itself).

categories_present.label: Application code
categories_present.required_doc_updates: Per docs/DOCS_IMPACT_MATRIX.md row for the matched path: CURRENT_STATE.md snapshot fields, CHANGE_LOG.md entry, README.md section if architecture/logic/contracts changed.
categories_present.practical_verification: Standard feature/bug-fix verification for the changed behavior. If the change touches business logic, the Cross-Platform Parity Protocol (SYNC_PROTOCOL.md) applies: run `npx --prefix mobile tsc --noEmit -p mobile/tsconfig.json` if mobile parity is affected, and the Practical Verification Gate does not apply unless the file is also a script/automation.
categories_present.review_reason: Business-logic changes require an explicit Web-Mobile Parity declaration before merge (SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Merge Guard); standard code review otherwise.

categories_present.label: Automation script (general repository automation)
categories_present.owning_authority: docs/shared/reference/catalog/task_library/TRANSACTION_FRAMEWORK.md (names scripts/git-safe-publish.sh for Stage 5); SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Practical Verification Gate.
categories_present.required_doc_updates: None unless its documented behavior changes — then update whichever authority names it.
categories_present.practical_verification: SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Practical Verification Gate, "For scripts" (mandatory). If the file is scripts/git-safe-publish.sh specifically, the five additional script-specific checks in that Gate also apply (no push during test; stops on validation failure; stops on rebase conflict; prints AUDIT_PROMPT; does not scan local_folder/backups/).
categories_present.review_reason: Always review — repository automation, and at maximum sensitivity if the file is scripts/git-safe-publish.sh (the Publication mechanism for every transaction type).

categories_present.label: Configuration
categories_present.owning_authority: .instructions.md Section 2 item 6; SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Classification table row "Configuration".
categories_present.required_doc_updates: CHANGE_LOG.md entry if an env var or config dependency changed (SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Update Triggers).
categories_present.practical_verification: Confirm the app still builds/starts with the new configuration if the change is behavior-affecting.
categories_present.review_reason: Recommend review if it touches secret/credential-shaped values or changes a build/CI-relevant script entry; not needed for cosmetic comments.

categories_present.label: Database / schema truth (incl. change-control artifacts)
categories_present.required_doc_updates: DB_CHANGE_LEDGER.md row (DATABASE_TRUTH.md table: scripts/0N_*.sql, supabase/migrations/**, supabase/sql_checks/**, supabase/exec_success_migrations/** are change-control artifacts, not truth dumps).
categories_present.practical_verification: Apply + verify migration per DB_CHANGE_PROTOCOL.md workflow; never hand-edit a truth dump (DATABASE_TRUTH.md Inspection Rule 7).
categories_present.review_reason: Schema/RLS/function changes are the highest-risk category in this repository's own DB_CHANGE_PROTOCOL.md.

categories_present.label: Documentation / reference truth
categories_present.owning_authority: docs/STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md (placement, Sections 2-3, 14); the specific reference doc's own domain.
categories_present.required_doc_updates: SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Index Update Rule if the doc is new/moved/materially changed (update the owning category README.md and docs/MASTER_INDEX.md if it introduces a new section that index doesn't list).
categories_present.practical_verification: Not applicable unless the doc is itself a script/contract/prompt (then use the repository_authority verification instead).
categories_present.review_reason: Safe for wording/clarity edits. Recommend review only if the edit redefines a policy/protocol meaning rather than clarifying existing text.

categories_present.label: Evidence
categories_present.owning_authority: The relevant module/category/plan evidence/ folder (docs/STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md Sections 2-3).
categories_present.required_doc_updates: None beyond the evidence file itself, unless it underpins a promotion claim (STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md Section 28).
categories_present.practical_verification: Confirm the evidence reflects an actually-run command/test — No Assumption Protocol (.instructions.md Section 4); never fabricated.
categories_present.review_reason: Low risk on its own. Recommend review only if it is being cited to justify a promotion or Done+Verified status.

categories_present.label: Generated artifact
categories_present.owning_authority: SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Generated Artifact Rule; docs/shared/reference/DATABASE_TRUTH.md for DB dumps/manifests specifically.
categories_present.required_doc_updates: None — never hand-edit a generated artifact.
categories_present.practical_verification: Identify the generator script, re-run it, and confirm the regenerated output's manifest/hash matches (repo_health_audit.mjs Check 6 does this for supabase/backups/full_metadata.sql specifically).
categories_present.review_reason: Safe if produced by its own generator in this same change. Recommend review only if it appears hand-edited (drift) rather than regenerated.

categories_present.label: Implementation plan
categories_present.required_doc_updates: Platform INDEX.md / IMPLEMENTATION_TRACKER.md if status changed; promotion-before-removal summary (STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md Section 28) if any item became Done+Verified.
categories_present.practical_verification: STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md Section 30 Mandatory Plan Update Protocol: pre-read gate, update-scope gate, cross-file consistency gate, then `npm run docs:validate:plans`.
categories_present.review_reason: Safe for routine progress updates. Recommend review if an item is marked Done+Verified without a completed promotion summary.

categories_present.label: Repository authority (the operating contract itself)
categories_present.owning_authority: The file is itself an authority; governed by .instructions.md Sections 1, 3, 5, 6 (placement/minimalism/no-duplicate-authority) and docs/STRUCTURE_GUIDE.md.
categories_present.required_doc_updates: None by default beyond the file itself — but check whether the edit invalidates any other authority's cross-reference (SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Index Update Rule).
categories_present.practical_verification: SYNC_PROTOCOL.md Practical Verification Gate, "For prompts/task contracts": dry-run reasoning test against a realistic example; confirm authority routing, Artifact Intake result, and validation commands named are still accurate.
categories_present.review_reason: Governs every future agent's behavior in this repository — always review.
